TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Qus == u sulit nu Hulam: ŚíĆŚĻ≥ťÉ®ŤźĹ i Taoyuan a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Qus. u kasalumaluma' nu Qus sa, 14 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 47 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 40 ku tademaw, pakalatu 85%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 7 ku tademaw, pakalatu 15%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 79%, Amis 4%, Paiwan 2%. Qus u sulit nu Hulam: ŚļęŚŅóťÉ®ŤźĹ i Taoyuan a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Qus. u kasalumaluma' nu Qus sa, 75 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 168 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 146 ku tademaw, pakalatu 87%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 22 ku tademaw, pakalatu 13%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 81%, Amis 2%, zumazuma 4%.
S.PHON: == *us == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** i taojuan a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu *us. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu *us sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, ** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajar~…ĺ **%, amis *%, paiwan *%. *us u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** i taojuan a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu *us. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu *us sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajar~…ĺ **%, amis *%, zumazuma *%.

Qus u sulit nu Hulam: ŚļęŚŅóťÉ®ŤźĹ i Taoyuan a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Qus. u kasalumaluma' nu Qus sa, 75 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 168 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 146 ku tademaw, pakalatu 87%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 22 ku tademaw, pakalatu 13%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 81%, Amis 2%, zumazuma 4%.
